name: widget-unknown-type-fail
description: Choice has 'type': 'pie-chart' — not a registered widget type in the GradeEarn renderer. Judge MUST flag DIAGRAM_INCOHERENT (unknown type would render as 'Diagram unavailable' to the kid).

question.question: Which model represents 1/4 of the circle?
question.explanation: A rectangle divided into 4 equal parts with 1 shaded shows 1/4.
